author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Upcoming May Preseason Patch

Get ready for a new patch coming on May 14!   

 Completed in-game Pearce X5 model
 Brand-new Shotgun
 CO-OP Dogfighting
 Dedicated servers for shooter game modes
 Major updates to Paizul's Arena shooter map
 Shiploads more! 

Full patch notes + a video rundown drop on May 14. 

 | Get early access to Star Atlas by typing /key in ⁠🔑┃game-access-key
